dc_description: A narrow paved rural road runs through a wooded area, curving gently into the distance. Tall trees line both sides, forming a partial canopy overhead. Strong sunlight filters through the leaves, casting long irregular shadows across the cracked asphalt. Dry yellow-brown grass, leaf litter, and underbrush border the road, with fence posts visible along the left side.
novel_visual_observations: The road surface shows numerous fine cracks and patchy texture, especially in the foreground. The lighting is high-contrast, with the right side and distant road more brightly illuminated while the left foreground remains heavily shaded.
rich_context: Via Ronci, Nepi, Viterbo, Lazio, 01036, Italia
